description_long: This is a standard Bordeaux-style wine bottle with a deep, dark glass body and a cylindrical shape. The bottle features a prominent red capsule covering the neck and closure, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The front label is white with elegant script, displaying the brand name 'Josh' and additional details in smaller text, while the back label contains more information and a barcode. The glass is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and emphasizing the bottle's clean lines. The neck is long and gently tapered, leading to a slightly flared lip at the top. The overall design is typical for red wines, intended to preserve the wine's quality and present a sophisticated look.
description: A dark glass Bordeaux-style wine bottle with a red capsule, white front and back labels, and a long, tapered neck. The bottle has a glossy finish and classic wine branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white label with 'Josh' branding and the red capsule on the neck.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the transition between the front and back labels and the bottle's cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back label with text and a barcode, as well as the full red capsule.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the edge of the front label and more of the back label.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label is white with elegant script reading 'Josh' and additional smaller text, placed centrally and vertically on the bottle. The back label is also white, containing more detailed information and a barcode, both labels are rectangular and wrap partially around the bottle.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow, and gently tapered neck with a slightly flared lip at the top.
